JavaScript tests for Number object behavior, properties, methods, and prototype in various scenarios.

## Folders
- **[15.07.01](15.07.01/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for converting various data types to numbers, including strings, objects, and errors.
- **[15.07.02](15.07.02/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for Number object creation, properties, methods, and prototype behavior.
- **[15.07.03](15.07.03/README.md)**: JavaScript tests for Number object prototype properties, behaviors, and specific property checks.
- **[15.07.04](15.07.04/README.md)**: Tests for `Number.prototype` methods and properties, including `toString`, `toFixed`, and constructor behavior.

## Files
- **[15.07-001.js](15.07-001.js.md)**: Tests the behavior of the Number object when reassigned to null and instantiated.
